body.title: CLOSED: Add dogtail (AT-SPI2) driver to SWADL
body.result: driver adapter added to swadl_driver.py with tests, 756f742
body.description:
Add dogtail as a supported interface library in SWADL. dogtail walks the AT-SPI2 accessibility tree — the Linux equivalent of Windows UIA that pywinauto uses. Best for native KDE/GTK apps that expose AT-SPI. Requires the at-spi2-core service running.

**Affected files:** swadl/SWADL/engine/swadl_driver.py, swadl/SWADL/engine/swadl_base_automation.py, requirements.txt
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; new driver follows existing driver pattern
**Scope boundary:** driver wrapper + config key; does NOT add KDE-specific widget helpers
**Test plan:** unit test that dogtail driver initialises; integration test skipped if at-spi2 not available (mark xfail with reason)
